历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for the science group was approximately 10035 → 9540 → 9918 → 10091 → 12163, with an overall backward shift of about 2200 positions in the last three years. The 2025 baseline is about 12163, with a significant backward shift. The university's enrollment plan for the science group in Gansu Province was 158 in 2021, 163 in 2022, 163 in 2023, 170 in 2024, and 178 in 2025, showing a continuous expansion trend. The 2026 plan is 208, an increase of 30 (+16.9%) compared to 2025, a relatively large expansion, easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university. The Soft Science main ranking has steadily risen from 76th in 2021 to 69th in 2026, reflecting enhanced comprehensive strength and reputation. In 2022, there was a negative academic misconduct incident (negative evaluation), but no significant reputation events in recent years. Douyin popularity ranks 75th, rated as 'average', with low short video platform exposure and stable application attention. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, four disciplines—Crop Science, Plant Protection, Animal Science, and Grassland Science—were rated A-, all core agricultural and forestry disciplines highly related to the enrollment majors, attracting some interest in related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The university offers popular majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information, and Electrical Engineering, which remain socially popular. In 2026, the total number of examinees in Gansu Province is about 218,700, an increase of about 21.6% compared to 2025 (Physics Category 121,443 + History Category 58,374 ≈ 179,817), significantly intensifying competition. The university is located in Xianyang City, Shaanxi Province, adjacent to Gansu, providing natural regional affinity and transportation convenience for Gansu examinees. The university's enrollment proportion in Gansu is relatively high; in 2025, Gansu enrollment was about 7 people (0.0117% of the total), but the actual science group plan reached 178, making Gansu an important source province in the northwest region.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical ranking backward trend, the significant expansion in 2026 (+16.9%), the continuous rise in Soft Science ranking, and the notable increase in the number of local examinees, the expansion effect and intensified competition offset each other. It is expected that the minimum ranking for the science group in 2026 will continue to shift backward from the 2025 baseline of 12163, but the shift will be moderated due to expansion. The predicted minimum ranking is about 13342, with a range of 12842–13842.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking for the 2026 science group is about 13342, with a range of 12842–13842. For rankings within the predicted range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 flagship majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety. For rankings significantly better than the lower limit (<12842), focus on Tier 1 popular majors like Electrical Engineering, Computer Science, and Electronic Information. For rankings near the upper limit (>13842), it is recommended to prioritize Tier 3 agricultural and forestry characteristic majors, supplemented by Tier 2 moderate majors, to ensure admission.
